name: Team Jealous
subject: Did you see this note from Bernie?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
Last week, Senator Bernie Sanders sent an email supporting Ben's gubernatorial campaign.
Ben was proud to support Bernie Sanders and co-chair his campaign in Maryland because Bernie understands that now is not a time for timidity in our country. **[I hope you take the time, read his email, and chip in $3 to Ben's campaign before our end-of-month deadline to show the real strength of this people-powered movement.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1091/3107495986/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst-bernie18?refcode=OHQ02278A")**
Team Jealous
* * *

Sisters and Brothers -
One of the great lessons of our presidential campaign was that we showed -- in a way that can change politics in America forever -- that candidates don't have to spend all of their time begging millionaires and billionaires for money in order to win.
We proved that if you run a campaign that authentically and unapologetically speaks to the needs of the working people of this country, they will respond overwhelmingly.
My friend **Ben Jealous** is running that kind of campaign as he seeks the Democratic nomination to serve as the next Governor of Maryland. His campaign, like ours, is powered by lots of people giving small amounts of money. He's received more individual donations than any other candidate in the race -- a fact noticed by the special interests likely to spend heavily to stop him. Sound familiar?
**[Will you join Bernie in making a $3 donation to Ben Jealous' campaign to serve as the next Governor of Maryland?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1091/3107495986/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst-bernie18?refcode=OHQ02278A")**
****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1091/3107495986/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst-bernie18?refcode=OHQ02278A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1090/3107495986/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1093/3107495986/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a1092/3107495986/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73e/7ab0e2c4/7f43df31/349a109d/3107495986/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Battleground Update (via Florida Dems)
subject: again and again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Everyone:

We're building a blue tsunami in Florida. It's happening. And it's not because billionaires are funding our candidates -- it's because **grassroots activists like you are taking a stand.**

We've already flipped many deep-red seats across Florida this year, including sending Margaret Good into office in HD 72 earlier this month.

Our Special Election Fund helped make those victories happen. We've got two more special elections in the coming months. We need your help to prepare.

[**Please, help us flip more seats and turn Florida blue in 2018. We might never have another chance like this. Let 's give it everything we've got: Help us raise $20,000 in grassroots donations before midnight on February 28th!**](http://act.floridadems. name: Donna Edwards
subject: Hours before we close the books
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382ddd/2169167372/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180227_eom1_em")

Friend,
We've got less than 48 hours before we close the books on February, and we need your help to hit our grassroots fundraising goal for the month.
Reaching our monthly goals is critical to spreading our message to everyone in the community. We just opened our campaign office in Capitol Heights, and our team needs more resources to fill it with volunteers.
**[We need 200 grassroots donations to finish February strong -- can you chip in $5 or more before tomorrow's deadline at midnight?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382ddd/2169167372/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180227_eom1_em")** **We 're building a better future for our county from the bottom up, and that starts with you. **
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382ddd/2169167372/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180227_eom1_em")**
We can transform Prince George's County into a community where innovation thrives, families have good paying jobs, children get the best education we can offer, and residents are empowered to hold leaders accountable.
Our team is organizing our communities to build our grassroots momentum, and we need to hit our fundraising goals so we can make more calls, knock on more doors, and organize our neighborhoods block by block.
Can I count on you to help spread the word about our campaign and meet our February fundraising goal?
**[Make a contribution of $5 or more before midnight tomorrow.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382ddd/2169167372/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180227_eom1_em")**
Thanks for everything you do,
Donna

**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382ddd/2169167372/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180227_eom1_em")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff7b/767134fb/5cceb635/43382dda/2169167372/VEsA/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer
P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

************

name: Marcus Constantino
subject: It's serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
The New York Times came to West Virginia and said that EX-CEO and convict Don Blankenship must be taken seriously because he is a "credible threat." This is not a joke. |
---
[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49819b44/2efbf85c/63fc85cb/4c928693/2472724034/VEsH/ "http://www.joemanchinwv.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=JM_EM_FR_WV180DO_180227_1_2&source=JM_EM_FR_WV180DO_180227_1_2&refcode=JM_EM_FR_WV180DO_180227_1_2")

Friend,

The New York Times came to West Virginia and said that EX-CEO and convict Don Blankenship must be taken seriously because he is a "credible threat." This is not a joke.

He's dumping piles of his own cash into TV ads to take Joe down. Blankenship said he will spend whatever it takes to get elected.

What Don Blankenship and his Washington cronies are not counting on is Joe's grassroots army of supporters to counter his nearly $1 MILLION in TV ads so far.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Your support makes the revolution possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Our Revolution is building an organization to last by connecting neighbors with neighbors
#
Friends,
Our Revolution is building an organization to last by connecting neighbors with neighbors. Our strategy is to focus on grassroots organizing and supporting local groups to ignite movements within their community.
[**Key primary races for Our Revolution candidates have already started --chip in $5 to help us take over the 2018 election cycle by electing progressives to office!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe0559/1439579564/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180227")
Small-dollar contributions like yours give us the means to organize. Your support allows our organization to grow and expand the grassroots networks Our Revolution groups are building. They help to pay for the texting software we use during elections to provide voters with critical voting information. They help pay for the calling tool that connects volunteers with progressive voters across the country so we can let them know where they can find their polling place, who the Our Revolution endorsed candidates are on their ballot, and connect supporters with volunteers within the community to answer questions about the candidates or the election.
[**Can you make a $5 contribution that goes toward developing a permanent, progressive infrastructure where neighbors can work together to enact change?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe0559/1439579564/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180227")
Your investment in this organization means we can invest more in local groups in 2018. This year, we hope to place trained organizers on the ground to support the critical work of groups and offer them the skills and training to multiply their efforts.
Your contribution goes toward empowering politically-engaged people across the country with the training and skills to revolutionize their neighborhood. Thank you for making all of this possible.
In solidarity,
The Organizing Team
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe0559/1439579564/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180227")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe0558/1439579564/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe055b/1439579564/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe055a/1439579564/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acf1/bed43eb/45fdd029/75fe0545/1439579564/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Tom Perez
subject: Here's the truth about our organization, Derek:
body:
I know this is a big ask, but I would not make it if it wasn't important:
---
Derek --

Tonight at midnight is our monthly FEC fundraising deadline -- and one of the most important things you can do right now is become a sustaining contributor to keep up our fight for the long haul. Can I count on you to step up today?

**[Chip in $3 to become a sustaining donor before tonight's fundraising deadline. Your support will help Democrats organize nationwide and win in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220c7/4067b0a/57747b89e/7e57078c/4284336694/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/become-a-sustainer-today?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in++if+hpcraw+gt+100+35+elseif+hpcr&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp_v1s2")**

This is your party, Derek. By making a sustaining contribution you are not only helping determine the direction it will take -- you are also providing critical support to Democratic candidates across the country.

Building an organization from the ground up doesn't happen overnight. It requires time and investment -- and there's nothing more important than investing early if we're going to win in November.

**[Make your $3 monthly sustaining contribution before tonight's deadline to invest in Democrats running for office across the country.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220c7/4067b0a/57747b89e/7e57078d/4284336694/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/become-a-sustainer-today?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Make+your++if+hpcraw+gt+100+35+elseif+hp&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp_v1s2")**

Momentum is on our side, but it's going to take every single one of us giving it everything we've got in order to win.

Thanks for standing with Democrats,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

[DONATE](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220c7/4067b0a/57747b89e/7e57078a/4284336694/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/become-a-sustainer-today?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp_v1s2")

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220c7/4067b0a/57747b89e/7e570788/4284336694/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp_v1s2"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Team Lipinski
subject: early to work...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
The primary is 20 days away, and we're up early here at Dan's campaign HQ, working hard to re-elect Dan.

There are a lot of lies out there about Dan and his record, but this much we should all know for sure: He's a strong advocate for working families in Illinois.

[**Can you contribute now to help him keep fighting? We still have $5,187 left to raise.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCAZmON9tf8uzM1l217V9wtgVgkA82zDL779JZm3VB4=/XGzMYP4o4TFW1LMaOHjW09IYVIFjcflA0Z-rrUHyo00=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180228_1_2&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

**Begin forwarded message:**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCAZmON9tf8uzM1l217V9wtgVgkA82zDL779JZm3VB4=/Y880ektyiaYH9nj7a3rSQnyjNLB755aBgRN3oclr_ek=)

Peter,

All my career, I've stood for the working families of the Southwest Side. Since I came to Congress, we've seen a lot of change in the Third Congressional District. Factories have closed or moved, and manufacturing jobs have become harder to get. But our working families have continued to fight on.

In Congress, I've been fighting too. I'm fighting for American manufacturing, fair trade, and safe communities.

[**We 're only 21 days away from our primary election, so tomorrow is our FINAL monthly deadline. We need your help to keep fighting. Can you chip in now to show the depth of our grassroots support?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCAZmON9tf8uzM1l217V9wtgVgkA82zDL779JZm3VB4=/XGzMYP4o4TFW1LMaOHjW09IYVIFjcflA0Z-rrUHyo00=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180228_1_2&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCAZmON9tf8uzM1l217V9wtgVgkA82zDL779JZm3VB4=/XGzMYP4o4TFW1LMaOHjW09IYVIFjcflA0Z-rrUHyo00=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180228_1_2&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)
I'm often able to really make a difference in Illinoisans' lives. That's why I've received endorsements from local elected officials, the Illinois AFL-CIO, the _Tribune_ , and the _Sun-Times_ , and it's why I just received the American Trade Hero Award from the Coalition for a Prosperous America.

People in our district know they can rely on me. They've seen the bills I've authored become law, such as the American Manufacturing Competitiveness Act that requires the United States to develop a manufacturing strategy for the first time since Alexander Hamilton.

I've brought real investments to the area, including getting the law passed that created Chicago's Digital Manufacturing Design Institute.

[**I 'm not a big fan of Washington, but I'll tell you this: I spend every day there fighting hard for the Southwest Side. Now we've got a goal of bringing in $8,000 online before midnight tomorrow. Can you chip in?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eCAZmON9tf8uzM1l217V9wtgVgkA82zDL779JZm3VB4=/XGzMYP4o4TFW1LMaOHjW09IYVIFjcflA0Z-rrUHyo00=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180228_1_2&amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

I'm so thankful to have all of you stepping up.

Thanks,

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
---

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs IL 60558 United States

subject: meeting tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek -

Jenny here, Tim's finance director - wanted to check in with you real quick. I have a meeting with Tim [tomorrow](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=paoE7KIj4Bgg9axr1ra%2BkXFzvrEbK0ra) where we'll go over whether or not we hit February's goal.

[This goal is critical: Hitting our goal for $30,000 by tonight keeps us on track for the whole quarter.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=IUEqzUWlVGA5YPq%2BKMiLPXFzvrEbK0ra) And keeping up with these ambitious but necessary goals is the only way we can be prepared for all the PAC money that is about to be used against Tim.

[I've pulled some numbers and I know that if everyone chips in we will crush our $30,000 goal by midnight. **Here 's your file and how _YOU_ can make a big impact today:**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lc9tY%2BLC8%2BBkF0SEEiqM1HFzvrEbK0ra) | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iOSxVWvkQ4155IFFxEitoHFzvrEbK0ra)
---
[**Suggested Donation Today: $5.00**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=c6xIWPUTlYi849EgmJ9f%2BHFzvrEbK0ra)
Sometimes the goals our team sets are ambitious, but this is what has allowed us cycle after cycle to survive costly and aggressive attacks from right-wing groups eager to defeat Tim.

Tim always runs his campaigns with integrity, which is why he'll be so proud to hear that it was supporters like you who made the difference for this goal [tonight.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9tgMl29WHVxl4zJSJf8syl3BoWpAspqi)

Please, help me make sure I can give Tim the the good news [tomorrow.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fqm51gxiLgSUCb8FOhKWEXFzvrEbK0ra) [Will you add just $5 to your supporter record today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RGoaSsixoMg6NZEm6r4BoXFzvrEbK0ra)

We're so grateful for your continued support,

_Jenny_

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director
Kaine for Virginia 2018

name: The White House
subject: Meet Johnny Taylor, Jr.
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c9b2ae55299db27fae41974dd0758427bfead583f0d85ce40c5f50991e1e024ee7cb98158ec5a7133f08e8d96b1450c86

Meet Johnny Taylor, Jr.

Last February, President Donald J. Trump signed an Executive Order announcing the President’s Board of Advisors on Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs)—the earliest any American President has signed an Order on HBCUs during his term.

President Trump shared yesterday that Johnny Taylor, Jr., former seven-year president of the Thurgood Marshall College fund, will take over as Chairman of the Board. “I’ve been a CEO in both nonprofit and for-profit organizations,” Mr. Taylor said. “By working together across all sectors—the HR profession, HBCUs, and this Advisory Board—we can strengthen the relationship between education and employers.”

“I know he will advance the cause of HBCUs, a major priority of our Administration,” the President said.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c85dc31ed4c81a0659248d26da4a3bc3abc5c1ca1b103eeee35079ab695e1594539b8cbc6eb45e5cf92884717c0d49db2
Mr. Taylor shares his vision for America’s Historically Black Colleges and Universities

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c58519d323b7c5d9f019922bf93ce5a0acbfed8c8c85062a6360022730eb2371f49128c06d5bd38dcbb521db3f092c861
How the President has prioritized HBCUs since day 1

Play ball!

“Studies have shown that children who are involved in sports have greater self-discipline, higher self-esteem and are better at working with others,” Ivanka Trump wrote yesterday in an op-ed for NBC News.

Ms. Trump had a firsthand look at the height of American athletic excellence during her visit to the 2018 Olympic Games. “Our Olympic athletes had the opportunity to engage in sport at a young age, which allowed them to develop their talents,” she writes. “But to ensure that every American child has that same chance, we must break down barriers to youth sports participation.”

President Trump signed an Executive Order yesterday to accomplish just that. His directive addresses the issue from several angles, such as by:

- Establishing the President’s Council on Sports, Fitness, and Nutrition
- Partnering with groups in the public and private sectors to address the decline in youth sports participation
- Asking the Secretary of Health and Human Services to develop a national strategy to boost involvement in sports among children

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c142eebf8baf80114125cf87df1196598153b47109aff613ca33b131419189ff3133907c2c63bfc9b51c981051713e716
Ivanka Trump: The Olympics prove America is stronger when kids from all backgrounds play sports.

Tribute to a Hoosier Vice President and Second Lady

“Well hello, Indiana,” Vice President Mike Pence opened Monday night at a dinner with the Indiana Society of Washington, D.C. The Society gave the event an appropriate name: “Tribute to a Hoosier Vice President and Second Lady.”

“In the last year, we’ve made incredible progress all across this country,” the Vice President said. “We’ve reformed our tax code, we’ve rebuilt our military, and we’ve rolled back regulations. And confidence across Indiana and across America is booming.”

The dinner hit a particularly high note when Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb awarded Vice President Pence, his predecessor, with Indiana’s high civilian honor: the Sagamore of the Wabash. Previous recipients include Adam Vinatieri of the Indianapolis Colts and former Late Show host David Letterman.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c2b11149537a350fa61eb65e80a4c88d69c95742bead5a48845dcf498dfa8aa06ad44561ed4a63ddfc9e2c324ffd14d25
Read more of what Vice President Pence told his fellow Hoosiers Monday night.

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump hosts a Governors' Spouses Luncheon at the White House | February 26, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump, along with Vice President Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence will attend the arrival ceremony preceding the lying in honor of the Reverend Billy Graham at the U.S. Capitol. This afternoon, the President and Vice President will meet with bipartisan members of Congress to discuss school and community safety.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c73301d1748d2774800669e4e1421951fc001dd444453ffbbd66b3694fa6d8abaac7880d1548ae657b03e196e38443c34
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7374b47fd66075c39f7eb97db553832e115a199c5844e454bd809f311a7c2228085f30cb69de604d3856b9391ed6e71e047b24e08c889f2
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d438877a38aa87ff4167a88d13c8544facfe9f5c7b2e5eec02d975029cecbeaf6bddb0595f5399d1da093d7e5d773acaeb24e16fa699afc458
Unsubscribe

Trump signed an Executive Order announcing the President’s Board of Advisors on Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs)—the earliest any American President has signed an Order on HBCUs during his term. President Trump shared yesterday that Johnny Taylor, Jr., former seven-year president of the Thurgood Marshall College fund, will take over as Chairman of the Board. “I’ve been a CEO in both nonprofit and for-profit organizations,” Mr. Taylor said. “By working together across all sectors—the HR profession, HBCUs, and this Advisory Board—we can strengthen the relationship between education and employers.” “I know he will advance the cause of HBCUs, a major priority of our Administration,” the President said. Watch: Mr. Taylor shares his vision for America’s Historically Black Colleges and Universities Learn more: How the President has prioritized HBCUs since day 1 Play ball! “Studies have shown that children who are involved in sports have greater self-discipline, higher self-esteem and are better at working with others,” Ivanka Trump wrote yesterday in an op-ed for NBC News. Ms. Trump had a firsthand look at the height of American athletic excellence during her visit to the 2018 Olympic Games. “Our Olympic athletes had the opportunity to engage in sport at a young age, which allowed them to develop their talents,” she writes. “But to ensure that every American child has that same chance, we must break down barriers to youth sports participation.” President Trump signed an Executive Order yesterday to accomplish just that. His directive addresses the issue from several angles, such as by: - Establishing the President’s Council on Sports, Fitness, and Nutrition - Partnering with groups in the public and private sectors to address the decline in youth sports participation - Asking the Secretary of Health and Human Services to develop a national strategy to boost involvement in sports among children Ivanka Trump: The Olympics prove America is stronger when kids from all backgrounds play sports. Tribute to a Hoosier Vice President and Second Lady “Well hello, Indiana,” Vice President Mike Pence opened Monday night at a dinner with the Indiana Society of Washington, D.C. The Society gave the event an appropriate name: “Tribute to a Hoosier Vice President and Second Lady.” “In the last year, we’ve made incredible progress all across this country,” the Vice President said. “We’ve reformed our tax code, we’ve rebuilt our military, and we’ve rolled back regulations. And confidence across Indiana and across America is booming.” The dinner hit a particularly high note when Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb awarded Vice President Pence, his predecessor, with Indiana’s high civilian honor: the Sagamore of the Wabash. Previous recipients include Adam Vinatieri of the Indianapolis Colts and former Late Show host David Letterman. Read more of what Vice President Pence told his fellow Hoosiers Monday night. Photo of the Day First Lady Melania Trump hosts a Governors' Spouses Luncheon at the White House | February 26, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks) POTUS TODAY Today, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump, along with Vice President Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence will attend the arrival ceremony preceding the lying in honor of the Reverend Billy Graham at the U.S. Capitol. This afternoon, the President and Vice President will meet with bipartisan members of Congress to discuss school and community safety.

name: Seth Jennings
subject: Let’s continue to fight for RI!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Friend,
While in Washington last weekend, the Governor sat down with Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke -- the person overseeing the Trump Administration's plan to open federal waters off our coastline to offshore drilling. Gina was very clear: we don't want offshore oil exploration and drilling in Rhode Island.
We've made great progress to protect our coastal waters and coastal communities. For generations, proud Rhode Islanders have made their living as commercial fishermen. We are home to America's first offshore wind farm. We need a leader who isn't afraid to fight for us.
Gina stands with us. Can you donate to help support her? **[Click here to give $10 or as much as you can before MIDNIGHT tonight!](https://act.myngp.com/el/v_ujILuDWXTXQu6uLAGFsuRKhIPTRrmZaRTfrZFqbVU=/_Tce1G_vckSyLdn8bLq9fqH6-qzeOm5ISzxZl-QMVdY=?refcode=18228)**
Thank you,
Seth Jennings
Digital Director

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: 7 responses needed from 3264 (net neutrality)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is important: In December, the Republican-led FCC voted to repeal net neutrality, blatantly siding with corporations over everyday Americans.
Thanks to the FCC's decision, internet providers will be able to block or censor any site they dislike and even charge you more for tweeting, logging onto your email or streaming TV shows. Their vote takes an axe to the very idea of a free and open internet, hurting the economy, consumers, job growth and small businesses along the way.
**Now we 've got just a couple weeks left to overturn the FCC's decision before it becomes law.** **[Please, before it's too late, add your name to tell the Senate: Save net neutrality.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/save_net_neutrality?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-net-neutrality%3Fcode%3Djtk830-ja-nd)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BqJSM33mQ1E4VjqaHsUlmWD5lEGvZNYj&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Now is not the time to give up or shut up, Derek
body:
As long as we stand together and create a strong, inclusive Democratic Party, we will be unstoppable.
---
Derek --

In the past year, we have watched Donald Trump and his administration demonstrate an incredible capacity for dividing our country through fearmongering and lies. We have also watched the Republican Party fall right in line behind him.

Republicans from the halls of Congress to the White House have proven they don't have an interest in leading. At this critical moment, it's up to us to elect Democrats who are willing to step up and provide the leadership our nation so desperately needs.

**Will you donate $3 before the fundraising deadline tonight at midnight to elect Democrats nationwide this year? Take it from me -- donations made now go a long way toward victories in November.

** **[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb7/2901863417/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb4/2901863417/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb5/2901863417/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb2/2901863417/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb3/2901863417/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb0/2901863417/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/february-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")
** Now is not the time to give up or shut up -- it's time to rise up and speak up in support of our shared values.

We must ensure that our children are safe at school, make sure health care is a right and not a privilege, and offer working Americans a path for upward mobility. We must hold Trump and his party accountable. We must stand up for what's right. We can do all of this and more, but only if we work together.

**[If you're with us, chip in $3 before midnight tonight and let's get to work.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb1/2901863417/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/february-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+If+youre+with+us+chip+in++if+consinConsG&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")**

Thank you,

Cory Booker
U.S. Senator, New Jersey

P.S. -- Along with a few of my senate colleagues, I will be attending the DNC's 2018 IWillVote Gala next week. I'm really looking forward to talking about how we're going to organize our communities this year -- **[chip in $3 before midnight to be automatically entered for a chance to join me next week in D.C.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbbe/2901863417/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iwillvote-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")**

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **02/28/18.** Enter by contributing **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbbf/2901863417/VEsFBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iwillvote-gala-donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")** , or click **[here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbbc/2901863417/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/join-us-for-the-2018-iwillvote-gala?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; two (2) admission tickets to IWillVote Gala on Wednesday, March 7, 2018. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbbd/2901863417/VEsFAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/content/IWillVote-Gala-Official-Rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbba/2901863417/VEsFAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbbb/2901863417/VEsFAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=37+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb8/2901863417/VEsFDQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=38+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220ef/4067b0a/575823caf/7e57dbb9/2901863417/VEsFDA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=39+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&source=em_20180228_cb_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_cb_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Keren Charles Dongo, Team Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: A personal note (re: Black History Month)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

Black History Month is always a time of reflection. And as this Black History Month in particular draws to a close, I wanted to take a moment to share with you what being a part of this campaign means to me.

As an African American woman who's worked in politics for more than a decade and is now the campaign manager for Tim's re-election, I think about the trailblazers who broke down barriers so I could be where I am today - and, as a mother of a little girl, I think of the many barriers we still need to break.

Over the past year, we've felt the presence of hate - it's dominated the news media and, at times, it can feel like it's dominating our country. We've seen people in America's highest offices defending racist viewpoints, women being degraded as we fight for equal (and safe) footing in the workplace and in our communities, and people from nations in Africa, the Caribbean, and Central America being denigrated by disgusting slurs behind closed doors.

**But - despite all of this - we are making progress, both here in Virginia and nationwide.** Last year, historic numbers of African American candidates ran for office here in the Commonwealth - and Justin Fairfax became the second African American elected to statewide office in Virginia's history.

Women everywhere are speaking up and leading an unprecedented movement to hold those in power accountable. In Virginia, a record number of women were elected to office, where their voices can be louder than ever before. Black women continue to lead the conversation and organize our communities for change and growth. And each and every day, immigrants prove they are, and always have been, the backbone of the American dream.

**We haven 't given up, and we never will, because we owe it to our children to fight just as fiercely for them as our predecessors fought for us - which is why I'm proud to work with Tim Kaine.**

Together, we're building a campaign that will fight for all Virginians and work towards a more progressive, equal Commonwealth - one where every person, regardless of their race or gender identity or country of origin - has an equal opportunity to succeed. We're building that campaign because it's simply the right way forward - and Tim has always believed in fighting for what's right.

As I reflect on everything we've done - and everything we still must do - I am honored to be on Team Kaine, fighting for equality alongside each and every one of you.

I can't wait to see what we accomplish together, in 2018 and beyond.

Thank you for being a part of this with me.

_Keren_

Keren Charles Dongo
Campaign Manager
Kaine for Virginia 2018
| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=SulwcHXDgkbnsyeFVbHT35mOKQBEBjar)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uP1Z8n%2FK33J9K5qvQf9H2pmOKQBEBjar).
---

name: Abby Murphy, ConorLamb.com
subject: BREAKING: This race is now a TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conor Lamb for Congress
body:
**_BREAKING: This race is now a TOSS-UP_**
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/n2cFT-_25K7y4r0NzoN7lg==?utm_campaign=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Lamb&refcode=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM)
---

**[**CHIP IN TODAY >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/n2cFT-_25K7y4r0NzoN7lg==?utm_campaign=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Lamb&refcode=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM)**
---

Friend,

Unlike Rick Saccone, we don't rely on special interests lining up to buy this special election for Conor Lamb.

We've got grassroots supporters like you. And it's been working. **It 's why the well respected Cook Political Report just upgraded the race to a toss up.**

We'll win on March 13 -- just two weeks away -- with one conversation, one donation, one vote at a time. We'll win by telling people that Paul Ryan and his allies don't have working people's backs.

**[We'll win by showing people who Conor Lamb really is, by saying what we believe, why we believe it and how Conor is going to fight for change in Washington. Chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline and help win this race in the final days.](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/n2cFT-_25K7y4r0NzoN7lg==?utm_campaign=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Lamb&refcode=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM)**

I believe in protecting Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. I believe that workers should have a right to join a union, to earn good wages, and to have a secure retirement. I believe we can help families struggling with addiction.

And when Conor Lamb goes to Congress, I believe we won't just be sending a Marine veteran and former prosecutor to Washington to fight for Southwestern Pennsylvania -- we'll be sending a message to all the politicians who have ignored and lied to working families:

Their time is up.

**[I believe that Conor Lamb represents the new kind of leader we need, and I think you do, too. If you're with me -- if you believe in Conor -- chip in $5 or more today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/n2cFT-_25K7y4r0NzoN7lg==?utm_campaign=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Lamb&refcode=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM)**

Thank you,

Abby

Abby Nassif Murphy
Campaign Manager
Conor Lamb for Congress

**[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/n2cFT-_25K7y4r0NzoN7lg==?utm_campaign=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Lamb&refcode=em18_180228_Tossup_fnd_xq_ful__KM)**
---
** **

** **
Paid for by Conor Lamb for Congress
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/b9wI4NsOi26tu3SQaq4dNg==/4cSbMTgryens4L6ZLnb85Q==).

Conor Lamb for Congress
PO BOX 10381
Pittsburgh, PA 15234

Peter,

We've endorsed enough women to _single-handedly_ flip the House and Senate in November.

And just yesterday, we added one more to that list: Lisa Brown in Washington State's 5th Congressional District.

If we help all of these women win _and_ support our candidates running to hold blue seats, we can take back Congress. But we have to hit our End-of-Month goal first to make sure we have the resources to support them all.

name: Tom Wolf
subject: I need you with me, now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello --

What works for some politicians doesn't work for others. I'm proud to be a different kind of leader.

I've always fought to put Pennsylvanians first as governor, even if it was politically risky. And I'm proud of the progress we've accomplished together as a result.

But Republicans are spending millions on their own desperate attacks against me and everything we've accomplished together. They're trying to turn back the clock on our progress. I'm not backing down -- but I need you with me.

**I need your help to keep our brand new TV ad on the air. Will you chip in before tonight's deadline to keep up our momentum?** | | [$5 >>](https://secure.wolfforpa. But I need your help to prove it. "" "" Thanks for your support, Tom Wolf Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Team Gina
subject: Get organized for a safer RI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Friend,
**Rhode Islanders have been shaken by one tragic mass shooting after another.** Instead of working to prevent mass shootings, **Allan Fung and the other Republican candidates are opposing a state-level ban on assault weapons.** In his first comments after 17 students and teachers in a Florida high school were gunned down with an assault weapon, Fung opposed common-sense gun reform in Rhode Island and said he wants the NRA's endorsement.
We're working in every one of Rhode Island's 39 cities and towns to organize against Fung and other Republicans this November. **[Click here to learn how you can organize for a safer Rhode Island!](https://act.myngp.com/el/nGdsBlLxXFwBVfUpjHSkN8duX0PwsdqwanaREuMTG5o=/1g3J9xbCEVytkh9ua-mhEq5UUmmAXiWgS9BUMvnOx4E=)**
**Governor Raimondo is taking action to prevent gun violence.** Last year, she signed a law to keep guns away from convicted abusers. This week, Gina became the first Governor to sign an executive order establishing a Red Flag policy aimed at taking guns out of the hands of potential mass shooters. And she supports a ban on military style assault weapons, like those used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Orlando and Sandy Hook.
**We must channel our grief and outrage into action.** Now is the time to get organized and fight for a safer community for our children. Gina and Senator Sheldon Whitehouse are hosting local organizing meetings throughout Rhode Island to talk about the ways to get involved in the 2018 election and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **[Will you stand up for a safer Rhode Island by registering for your local organizing meeting?](https://act.myngp.com/el/nGdsBlLxXFwBVfUpjHSkN8duX0PwsdqwanaREuMTG5o=/1g3J9xbCEVytkh9ua-mhEq5UUmmAXiWgS9BUMvnOx4E=)**
In solidarity,
Team Gina
**PS:[Register for your local organizing meeting here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/nGdsBlLxXFwBVfUpjHSkN8duX0PwsdqwanaREuMTG5o=/1g3J9xbCEVytkh9ua-mhEq5UUmmAXiWgS9BUMvnOx4E=)**
###### **Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.**
###### **Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940**
###### **If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](http://ginaraimondo.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=nGdsBlLxXFwBVfUpjHSkN8duX0PwsdqwanaREuMTG5o=&tiid=xm58CggTDaZj9ek97FkOGOJM7K5Z3w769zBfg9NeBE0=).**

name: Jason Kander
subject: This is un-American, Derek
body:
We can't let Republicans take away our right to vote. Join the fight for access to the ballot box before tonight's deadline.
---
Derek --

Before we can get out the vote, we must protect the vote.

The GOP is dead set on making it as difficult as possible for voters to cast their ballots this November -- and not just any voters. Republican-led state legislatures across the country have specifically targeted communities of color and young people with their voter suppression laws -- people they know are more likely to support Democrats.

This is un-American, Derek. Voting should not be more difficult for anyone because of their race, ethnicity, gender, age, or income.

If we don't fight back, more Americans will be at risk of becoming disenfranchised -- and Republicans will continue to be at an unfair advantage. It's up to us to protect the right to vote and ensure all of our voices are heard at the ballot box.

**Before tonight's fundraising deadline, chip in $3 to support Democrats who will fight for voting rights.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fbc/2255058384/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/voting-rights-now?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fbd/2255058384/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/voting-rights-now?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fba/2255058384/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/voting-rights-now?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fbb/2255058384/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/voting-rights-now?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fb8/2255058384/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/voting-rights-now?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579fb9/2255058384/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/voting-rights-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")
** Republicans claim that voter suppression laws will prevent illegal voting and fraud -- but the truth is that the GOP simply wants to make it harder for voters to participate in our elections. They know that when more people vote, Democrats win.

These laws are an attack on our democracy, plain and simple. Right now it's up to us to do something about it.

**[Contribute $3 before tonight's deadline if you're ready to support Democrats who will protect voting rights.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579f46/2255058384/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/voting-rights-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup28497++set&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2")**

All my best,

Jason Kander

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579f47/2255058384/VEsFBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579f44/2255058384/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579f45/2255058384/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405220fd/4067b0a/5740e0331/7e579f42/2255058384/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&source=em_20180228_jk_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_jk_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:

Friend,

If you haven’t made a contribution yet to help meet our February goal,
can you step up now?

Legit supporters all over the country are coming together to help hit
our goal by midnight, and we’re just $1,220 away. But we need to make
one last push before the deadline.

Legit supporters across the country are stepping up to help us reach
our grassroots goal for February, because they know what LegitAction
is capable of when we’re funded full-strength.

We can reach this goal by midnight if supporters like you act as soon
as you read this message.

help reach the last $1,220 we need before the month ends at midnight
tonight.

Russ set this goal because it’s the only way to make sure we have the

meeting it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

name: Our Revolution
subject: Help us reach our goal!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Our Revolution is building an organization to last by connecting neighbors with neighbors
#
Friends,
Our Revolution is building an organization to last by connecting neighbors with neighbors. Our strategy is to focus on grassroots organizing and supporting local groups to ignite movements within their community.
[**Key primary races for Our Revolution candidates have already started --chip in $5 to help us take over the 2018 election cycle by electing progressives to office!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe0779/918336819/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re")
Small-dollar contributions like yours give us the means to organize. Your support allows our organization to grow and expand the grassroots networks Our Revolution groups are building. They help to pay for the texting software we use during elections to provide voters with critical voting information. They help pay for the calling tool that connects volunteers with progressive voters across the country so we can let them know where they can find their polling place, who the Our Revolution endorsed candidates are on their ballot, and connect supporters with volunteers within the community to answer questions about the candidates or the election.
[**Can you make a $5 contribution that goes toward developing a permanent, progressive infrastructure where neighbors can work together to enact change?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe0779/918336819/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re")
Your investment in this organization means we can invest more in local groups in 2018. This year, we hope to place trained organizers on the ground to support the critical work of groups and offer them the skills and training to multiply their efforts.
Your contribution goes toward empowering politically-engaged people across the country with the training and skills to revolutionize their neighborhood. Thank you for making all of this possible.
In solidarity,
The Organizing Team
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe0779/918336819/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe0778/918336819/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe077b/918336819/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe077a/918336819/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acfd/bed43eb/4400b6dd/75fe0765/918336819/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to hear it from me. |
---
| | | | | | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=68d6641340b51572b9dd17bb877194e8704bb2305ffc314d826ebf02c4106cf0db65e4d85dd4708e944c3d657621e648148d93c1f1e955bb)
---

Friend,

You were there when our movement began. You were there when they said we were destined to lose. You were there when the Washington swamp tried to destroy our presidency.

Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=5pQKHCjaywuKW6lLxggby89HRSeIyNwhMKBpQHExKAN02L05NaIPy_oTRGd0LDe0X57E_Njt68lJO0ZtIG85MTbUHMuCR1zLBFUVHP_O2gODxarXujUkouWRvHY-H4N2OltMZ5039euSGTIfc6G4Bw5OpGm9Vw3f1XepLsOYe2iKs1LBtFv7JJd8SOJ7pmykFi5la7lNrMPP0axuyruIkau14xNeJgypSwFy5endtCa6B2Nh432kP1ahnqd7_95v09hoKzFwXNJBRKafMGBF1A%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=5pQKHCjaywuKW6lLxggby15-cXMs1P5ly_89GSOiG0SSqVybFJX1nvjYcCFyTPGwsVVh2aLXuq2BjixCvuv9QNBcdKEGsIK-y_SdbcoGvfVampGMilp1UstTnhzr2ELPzj3_8D4e8lruEsw9cc5fCGCwtbEYTK62xV8Nu1AmiuXnaGcbBehlSeGOlwlP-1919UeESx6W0bVReIWDU4l9TqavX2PkbCZ36GKZvhtzNrSk9bsOm_bOmn-ooqyLFGL-uJDWoESDoNFpXNt-OE8W7w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=5pQKHCjaywuKW6lLxggbywDTivwTe00Nnu8iy_7MaWC9W02iLI3DTbdhf-7LtYjjUBiTKHei5wn1ikcIjvJxNqW1cJ0-twEB4aSpHHgMw6bE6eV_7TjzjSPZr0deF3dC8Dl1Dsq6VukO-4KzPt7hNQO6yKXkRlaOq7lgqxImVihNctrByog8T6kYDv9FR_yDXrl6LjKM42FEFaGjLzWHYIzhwt3XSz6G71CCkODxJ_TraUYR02PAhNKzHGjzLnrUsPyxVa0DgZ3dqW0yZujqRQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=5pQKHCjaywuKW6lLxggby0w5ampxEb71hbw7nZXdlaUejYDADEyx-IwiSmC5iKq_yKkzwuzo-0oh_H-I86v-YgdgnGTQXsTM8nJT6OmIgmfwL2FPb1LG9nCouvYe7AVpNyzSQmOB7z4rHogcCwbkhl67jAOF34QdvaoIppdznhhemkB_ZBoq8y-tU2evZEoOOQJgxFUAr4z60QgG6eSwkoX_XfEXWCf9BkzyqcfQATK0FKrad-sjyR06uFPyj5OqcO2WOQXQFbFraLgIDBlXoX-A-7ktAIaAo1HpfuB7nwOV_hy6Y_24__btOnGBbDjJF0NKauUtBk3O9LVIPyiZrDhIeaZWkqu4waGbIzEODWexzte1iDjkb8JY5nFZRy-ZmUxtNcWpH-65VRCX4Duwfw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=HqEZ2HFC1vf77x2YCu1GC-kX-nHIyPuJn8DADgL4B6_aUbLG72EXmv1RPTIvnLDSsuZhqzMoCurFqec3P319cFoRD4reRihsSp9T_3uAGGZT_CcmhJ3hbCeteChqNw04FLUJVijZxbIM18mJ4BQXhpEsrpNHMirDp6LgiDhwOHozFlzOyjj2tfQH1AGLiyFBdeY2W35B_m-TUHYIOM9JFi38FfQ1hcP-3FpRVrBSz-0qUbEvAkHOJiMmiJGEGAAf) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4021d250788b4fe28d9b944402d48360&_e=HqEZ2HFC1vf77x2YCu1GC-kX-nHIyPuJn8DADgL4B6_aUbLG72EXmv1RPTIvnLDSsuZhqzMoCurFqec3P319cFoRD4reRihsSp9T_3uAGGZT_CcmhJ3hbCeteChqNw04FLUJVijZxbIM18mJ4BQXhpEsrpNHMirDp6LgiDhwOHozFlzOyjj2tfQH1AGLiyFBdeY2W35B_m-TUHYIOM9JFi38FfQ1hcP-3FpRVrBSz-0qUbEvAkHOJiMmiJGEGAAf) to unsubscribe. clean_body: I know I already reached out to you about this, but I'm trying to send a big message to the Washington status quo this month, and we're only $2,310... Friend, I know I already reached out to you about this, but I'm trying to send a big message to the Washington status quo this month, and we're only $2,310 away from making that happen. With less than 14 hours till midnight, I'm counting on everyone getting this email to help push us to victory. You can use this link and your donation will be counted immediately: If we reach our goal, it will prove Wisconsin is ready for REAL leadership and an end to Washington dysfunction. I know we can do it. Leah \------Forwarded Message------ Friend, The senate continues to be the best example of Washington dysfunction. A month ago, they shut down the government for no good reason. This month, they're going to move forward on immigration plans drawn up by Chuck Schumer, of all people! It has to stop. The Democrats in the Senate need to go. You’ve heard it from me before, Friend, but that’s why I’m running. To defeat Tammy Baldwin and turn Wisconsin red again. To do that, I need your help. With just 28 days to fundraise in February, we're going to have to step up our efforts. I made a $15,000 goal to reach by midnight on February 28th. I want to have successful month to make it more clear than ever that the Wisconsin way is coming to Washington. We've had enough of the inaction. Wisconsin deserves better than the failures of the status quo. Let's meet our goals and help bring conservative change to Washington: Thank you, Friend. Leah P.S. We have less than 72 hours before we have to close the books on February fundraising, and I don’t want to fail: Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: No time to waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb319b/9e00690/429e7a8a/2403a09e/516700451/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Hello,

Over the last two weeks, we've seen courage from every corner of this state. We fought for common sense gun safety reforms like banning assault weapons and making sure domestic abusers can't buy guns anymore.

We've stood up to the gun lobby -- because we know our kids' safety in their schools, or our families' safety in public parks should mean more to our legislators than an AR-15.

_This isn 't my first time standing up like this -- I'm the only Democrat who has stood in the gap and beaten the gun lobby in court twice._

We've got all the momentum in this race -- and it's never been more important for Florida families to get a fighter in the Governor's Mansion.

**[We only have a few hours before our end-of-month deadline -- can I count on you to chip in before midnight?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb319b/9e00690/429e7a8a/2403a091/516700451/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+We+only+have+a+few+hours+before+our+endo")**

This is no time for anyone to sit on the sidelines. Our children have far too much at stake.

Bring it home,

Andrew

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb319b/9e00690/429e7a8a/2403a090/516700451/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-feb-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180228_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=3+-+Donate")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Our end-of-month deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
I see a Maryland with infinite potential, but that potential is stifled by a lack of opportunity for its residents.
It's time for us to come together across all the lines that divide us, to take on the big challenges of our time, and to restore opportunity for all Marylanders.
**I'm ready to do that as your next governor.**
We're hours away from our February end-of-month fundraising deadline, and 118 days away from the Maryland primary. With each passing deadline comes another opportunity to show the power and passion of the people who support our campaign, and motivation for others to join us.
[**Will you donate $5 right now to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11e8/2488659987/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02288A")
I am determined to see a Maryland where every individual can earn a living wage, has access to healthcare and a quality education, and in my lifetime see the end of discrimination in all forms.
Maryland, let's get back to doing big things again.
Onward,
Ben
****[CHIP IN TODAY](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11e8/2488659987/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst2-18?refcode=OHQ02288A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11eb/2488659987/VEsF/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11ea/2488659987/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11d5/2488659987/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a73c/7ab0e2c4/7f42e020/349a11d4/2488659987/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). subject: Fast and furious:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Elect Mike Stack
body:
|

| | **Did you see the news from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court:_it's on_!__ They have said our state's new Congressional map will go forward. ** You know what that means: the Republican smear machine is about to crank into high-gear. Attacks will come fast and furious. **[Chip in $11. Let's build our grassroots movement. Let's take back our country.](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d015/514534752/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&amount=11&recurring=1")** **_Mike_ ** Forwarded Message The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has ruled that our state's Congressional map was unfairly skewed in the Republicans' favor. The new map they released is much fairer, but it doesn't guarantee us any wins. Republicans are going to be on the attack. **[Chip in $11 so we can hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d015/514534752/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&amount=11&recurring=1")** Republicans have shown that they'll stop at nothing to get and maintain power. They'll disenfranchise voters. Rig maps. Attack anyone and everyone. All to keep power. If we're going to win in November and take back control, then we have to show up this election. **[Chip in $11. Let's build our grassroots movement across Pennsylvania.](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d015/514534752/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&amount=11&recurring=1")** Let's win in November and ensure that elected leaders truly represent the will of the voters. **_Mike_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d014/514534752/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d01b/514534752/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$35](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d01a/514534752/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$65](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc07316/7da2b91d/5cebb63f/5c66d019/514534752/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=65&refcode=2018-02-28-gerrymander2&refcode2=express-buttons")

clean_body: | | | Did you see the news from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court:it's on! They have said our state's new Congressional map will go forward. You know what that means: the Republican smear machine is about to crank into high-gear. Attacks will come fast and furious. "" Mike Forwarded Message The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has ruled that our state's Congressional map was unfairly skewed in the Republicans' favor. The new map they released is much fairer, but it doesn't guarantee us any wins. Republicans are going to be on the attack. "" Republicans have shown that they'll stop at nothing to get and maintain power. They'll disenfranchise voters. Rig maps. Attack anyone and everyone. All to keep power. If we're going to win in November and take back control, then we have to show up this election. "" Let's win in November and ensure that elected leaders truly represent the will of the voters.
