name: Tom Perez
subject: I'm asking you, Derek
body:
If you're planning on waiting until later this year to make a donation, know that your support would make more of an impact now.
---
Republicans control both chambers of Congress and they have refused to do their job, Derek.

Let's be clear: Their job is not to protect the gun lobby. It is not to line the pockets of their wealthy donors with tax cuts. And it is not to dismantle the legacy of President Obama and hurt hardworking families.

Their job is to represent the people -- and if they won't do it, it's time to elect Democrats who will.

**Tonight at midnight we face an important FEC fundraising deadline. Will you donate $3 before then to give Democratic candidates the resources they need to win, Derek?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668d2/3201052345/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668d3/3201052345/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668d0/3201052345/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668d1/3201052345/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668de/3201052345/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668df/3201052345/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/february-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")
** Each day the GOP refuses to take action on issues like gun violence and immigration, people suffer. Students live in fear of whether their school will be a target of a mass shooting, and Dreamers remain uncertain whether they will be able to stay in the country they know and love.

But guess what, Derek? If Republicans won't do the job they were elected to do, we have the ability to take that job away from them -- but only if we start organizing now.

**[If you're with us, donate $3 before tonight's FEC fundraising deadline.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668dc/3201052345/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/february-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+If+youre+with+us+donate++if+consinConsGr&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2")**

Let's keep up the fight,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668dd/3201052345/VEsFBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668da/3201052345/VEsFBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=33+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668db/3201052345/VEsFAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522707/4067b0a/572a1e082/7e5668d8/3201052345/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&source=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2&refcode=em_20180228_tp2_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Carole King
subject: my friend Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi there, Peter,

Sherrod Brown is one of my dear friends.

I've been to the Buckeye State many times to perform, and also to stand with Sherrod. Why?

Because Sherrod stands with you -- and he doesn't just stand. _**He fights like hell for Ohioans!**_

Sherrod has a big deadline coming up. He's facing tough resistance from Republican special interests.

[_**Will you join me in supporting Senator Brown 's campaign with a $5 or $10 contribution before time runs out?**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/2000846a/1873954730/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?refcode=sbe1802ck_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/20008469/1873954730/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe1802ck_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/20008469/1873954730/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe1802ck_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/20008469/1873954730/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe1802ck_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/2000846a/1873954730/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?refcode=sbe1802ck_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
* Sherrod fought for months to secure long-term funding for the Children's Health Insurance Program.
* He passed a bill to help combat the opioid crisis in Ohio.
* And he fights every day to raise workers' wages, protect seniors, and lower student debt.

**Now more than ever, Ohio cannot afford to lose Sherrod 's gravelly voice in the Senate!**

He's a voice for the voiceless, an advocate for the middle class, and a staunch fighter for what's right.

And that's why I'm asking you to help my friend Sherrod.

[_**Chip in for Sherrod 's re-election with a contribution of $5, $10, or their average contribution of $26.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fe4fa/4462dc26/4fa704d3/2000846a/1873954730/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMmNrIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1802ck?refcode=sbe1802ck_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

Every dollar makes a difference.

Thank you so much!

Carole King

body:
Hi Peter,

It’s been so humbling to see all the enthusiasm for our
campaign from the people of the Southwest Side. People come up to
me every day to talk about the work I’ve done to support our
working families.

Let me get to the point: I hate asking for money, but we’re
only 20 days out from our primary election, and our final monthly
deadline is tonight at midnight. We need to raise another $2,792.

Can you make a contribution of whatever you feel comfortable
with right now?

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: "have to work a little harder"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | An article came out last week, outlining the challenges ahead in this campaign. It pointed out I'm up against "substantial GOP money" and said: _"she will probably have to work a little harder given the amount of cash her challengers are raising."_ I've never had a problem working hard. I first ran for office when I was 25 years old. I was in a six-person primary, up against the boys' club of Florida politics. I knew I wouldn't have the money to out-spend them. So what did I do? _I out-worked them._ Every single day, in the wet heat of the Florida summer, I knocked on doors. I walked through every neighborhood in my district, meeting as many people as I could. By the end of that campaign, I knocked on 25,000 doors -- and won a six-way primary and the general election. I've spent every day since working hard for South Florida families. No matter who attacks me, no matter how much money I'm up against, nothing will deter me from fighting for South Florida's priorities. **Together, we can out-work and out-organize our opponents in this race.** It doesn't take million-dollar checks. All it takes is a dedicated group of individuals chipping in $5 or $10 at a time. When that all adds up, it equals the kind of campaign that wins elections and makes a difference. [_**This month, we need our contributions to add up to $20,000. The deadline is closing in, and I don't want to miss it. So I'm asking you to give whatever you can today -- even if that is just $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f91/622b7b5b/1985ed14/307bb13a/1944882986/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180226z?refcode=dwse180226z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") If we all work hard, we will win. Thank you for working with me. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f91/622b7b5b/1985ed14/307bb13d/1944882986/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Brad Parscale
subject: Re: note for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Did you hear the big announcement? |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

I want to make sure you heard the President's big news that he is officially running for re-election in 2020.

I am honored and humbled that the President appointed me as his campaign manager.

But let me be clear: there's only one patriot out there who can help win this race... _YOU._

You're all we've got to fight back against the fake news media and the rabid Democrats.
---
| **[So before I give the President a list of everyone who stepped up before the first FEC deadline since the big announcement, please consider making a contribution of just $1 to show you're with us.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb3b4e323a72daa7c39e1923c94c0cfe04b644cb518b8fc5cea268591ca6ebc521e40688a5c36cc48ec67196ad143ed20c9)**
** [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb382380a1648fedeba3366a177cc6ec43012c82bf880a154c0b667c5f6142682d5e6867fdbef1fc6dd2c61e11ff540f8c5)** Thank you,

Brad Parscale
Campaign Manager
Donald J. Trump for President, 2020
**[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb367867791170767e5d91f8e96486ae5d66bdf0ed4ec6ff6297acc744075ad5e2a25dbed11a9068827059fead2a7c1fdfe)**

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb374629ceb005fc78a3990cebd40fbfa674be07dd465acc7d21964a104b59ccc5df6b6cb23874e749da47f1474732a2993)**

---
| [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7d82b7c08b6126d053938a1988e094f6e53584ffa9052c4e4909cd2a70a00ee2bc784751894a144a5fe463c6dda56125843717ac8ba9f18f)
---

Friend,

You were there when our movement began. You were there when they said we were destined to lose. You were there when the Washington swamp tried to destroy our presidency.

Friend, now I hope you will be there for my RE-ELECTION campaign in 2020 as we **KEEP FIGHTING TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Our big announcement comes on the day of a CRITICAL reporting deadline. Will you step up with a contribution of ANY amount to show you're ready to fight for another BIG win in 2020?
---
| ** [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb382380a1648fedeba3366a177cc6ec43012c82bf880a154c0b667c5f6142682d5e6867fdbef1fc6dd2c61e11ff540f8c5) ** You've seen how BRUTAL the fake news has been. You've seen how rabid the Democrats have become. We couldn't wait until 2019 to start fighting for re-election. We had to start NOW!

I don't care how many more witch hunts they launch...

I don't care how many more lies they spread about me and my family...

I don't care how many more cowards write fake books to try and distract the people...

**_Because there is NOTHING they can do to stop us from our mission to SAVE America._**

So now that it's official, let's blow our first goal out of the park. Let's show the media we're fighting harder than EVER before to Make America Great Again!

**[Please make a contribution of just $1 before the first reporting deadline since our re-election announcement.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb3e707a8cf2a2deb79b066362b246446ac8b2d318d6cbef2008c1308328477089f63a73d3a83e36ff0df087c2a78c5299c)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb3950650e6008fbd4f6485ceb0760d162a7ca7e2a0820ba2580e14f41e4680ecfbda9b63116d04cebd49ac7e0bd2fe9529)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States of America

**[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=640430a828c83cb367867791170767e5d91f8e96486ae5d66bdf0ed4ec6ff6297acc744075ad5e2a25dbed11a9068827059fead2a7c1fdfe)**

---

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7d82b7c08b6126d0fad4521945898903c65b4517f3a06617a0025835fa89a6bede4d124f36d545cb02cba9c5dbf4ab221647cf5ed273e4d5) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc0a3ae512185b3ccc70f05c36a6b8a5e053dcef37cbecdbcb98ca7cbc5ce237ac8751667bf4d73d895caf00a07542d8fb8ada9691c62d2b32) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256cf1b1da655ee79ceb9da8b8d76f0cdfc532a51e3bce322dbf5a8fb6687790385e85337eed20cf7586)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=9C=AD_Team_Kaine_HQ?=
subject: Bad news first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

**Here 's the bad news:** As we've told you, money from far-right groups has already started to have a huge impact on our campaign to re-elect Tim to the Senate.

**But here 's the good news:** If we meet our February goal in just a few short hours, we'll be track to have an incredible _first quarter of 2018._

And having a good first quarter isn't just about hitting our numbers - it's essential for showing strength in our shared values, in our campaign, and in the Democratic Party as a whole as we enter this potentially historic election year. [Chip in here to make sure we stay on track >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o9ONURi5OM1ROzX3xuAObEVh36mLpuVI)

We are now just $2,500 short in this final push for our $30,000 goal - _and we are not taking anything for granted this year._

Running a competitive campaign means taking every deadline seriously and setting clear benchmarks so that we put our best foot forward every single quarter, especially now that the election is _this year._

**Help us cross the finish line:** [Chip in to help us reach our goal and show the far-right groups attacking us that we have the money to fight back >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5VxfNK5gcWkN1puXzqzR%2FUVh36mLpuVI)

Thanks,

_Team Kaine HQ_

clean_body: Derek, Here 's the bad news: As we've told you, money from far-right groups has already started to have a huge impact on our campaign to re-elect Tim to the Senate. But here 's the good news: If we meet our February goal in just a few short hours, we'll be track to have an incredible first quarter of 2018. And having a good first quarter isn't just about hitting our numbers - it's essential for showing strength in our shared values, in our campaign, and in the Democratic Party as a whole as we enter this potentially historic election year. We are now just $2,500 short in this final push for our $30,000 goal - and we are not taking anything for granted this year. Running a competitive campaign means taking every deadline seriously and setting clear benchmarks so that we put our best foot forward every single quarter, especially now that the election is this year. Help us cross the finish line: Thanks, Team Kaine HQ | | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

name: Bob Casey
subject: only hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Important update for you, it'll just take a minute:

I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and she told me that we are about $6,300 short of where we need to be at this point in the fundraising quarter. Right now, my staff is debating between cutting our advertising budget, hiring fewer staff, or making smaller investments in our field operation to close that gap.

That worries me, to tell you the truth, because ever since I voted against the GOP's tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks against me. I sided with working families, not corporations or billionaires, and national Republicans aren't happy about that. President Trump even endorsed my opponent earlier this month, signaling to his far-right allies that it's time to go all-in on Pennsylvania.

You've probably already heard that Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, so we need to close our $6,300 budget gap before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight.

**Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take it a step further and become a campaign donor by chipping in $5 or more by midnight to help keep this race competitive.**

**Here 's the link: _[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a71/51dbcc2a/9782689/3a3712a/2934900098/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDIyOF9mcl9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180228_fr_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,
Bob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a71/51dbcc2a/9782689/3a3712b/2934900098/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia PA 19102 United States

One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; two (2) admission tickets to IWillVote Gala on Wednesday, March 7, 2018. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522718/4067b0a/57225367e/7e565e08/50130803/VEsFDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=38+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180228_dnc2_s2&source=em_20180228_dnc2_s2&refcode=em_20180228_dnc2_s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522718/4067b0a/57225367e/7e565e09/50130803/VEsFDA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=39+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180228_dnc2_s2&source=em_20180228_dnc2_s2&refcode=em_20180228_dnc2_s2"). Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Hours to deadline: As soon as you read this message
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Since we sent out our message this morning, folks everywhere have
stepped up -- and now we’re just $380 away from our critical
end-of-month goal. But our deadline is in mere hours.

If you step up before midnight, your contribution could put us over
the top.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5636?t=1002&akid=672%2E356062%2EtcD43O ]If you haven’t shown your support yet today, contribute
$3 now to help reach this last $380
before the clock strikes midnight.

Dedicated grassroots support brought us this close to our goal. Let’s
come together and close the gap before the clock runs out on February.

Thank you for taking action today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

------Original Message------
From: LegitAction Team
Subject: As soon as you read this message

Friend,

If you haven’t made a contribution yet to help meet our February goal,
can you step up now?

Legit supporters all over the country are coming together to help hit
our goal by midnight, and we’re just $1,220 away. But we need to make
one last push before the deadline.

Legit supporters across the country are stepping up to help us reach
our grassroots goal for February, because they know what LegitAction
is capable of when we’re funded full-strength.

We can reach this goal by midnight if supporters like you act as soon
as you read this message.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5636?t=1003&akid=672%2E356062%2EtcD43O ]Contribute $3 now to
help reach the last $1,220 we need before the month ends at midnight
tonight.

Russ set this goal because it’s the only way to make sure we have the
resources to keep delivering progress in March. We’re so close to
meeting it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5636?t=1004&akid=672%2E356062%2EtcD43O ]CONTRIBUTE »

name: Donna Edwards
subject: By tonight
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")

Friend,
We're fighting to ensure Prince George's County is a real contender in the Washington region.
That means more opportunities for families and small business owners, better education for our children, and a county that puts our community's needs first.
**We still need 57 contributions before we can close the books****on****February. Hitting this goal ensures that our team can make calls, knock on doors, and organize on the ground to spread our message to the entire county. **
**[Will you make a contribution now to help us finish February strong?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")**
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")**
\- Donna

\---Begin Forwarded Message---

Friend,
We've got less than 48 hours before we close the books on February, and we need your help to hit our grassroots fundraising goal for the month.
Reaching our monthly goals is critical to spreading our message to everyone in the community. We just opened our campaign office in Capitol Heights, and our team needs more resources to fill it with volunteers.
**[We need 200 grassroots donations to finish February strong -- can you chip in $5 or more before tomorrow's deadline at midnight?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")** **We 're building a better future for our county from the bottom up, and that starts with you. **
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")**
We can transform Prince George's County into a community where innovation thrives, families have good paying jobs, children get the best education we can offer, and residents are empowered to hold leaders accountable.
Our team is organizing our communities to build our grassroots momentum, and we need to hit our fundraising goals so we can make more calls, knock on more doors, and organize our neighborhoods block by block.
Can I count on you to help spread the word about our campaign and meet our February fundraising goal?
**[Make a contribution of $5 or more before midnight tomorrow.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")**
Thanks for everything you do,
Donna

**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0e/3295559911/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=rtw_180228_eom2_em")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff78/767134fb/5cc39e49/43382c0f/3295559911/VEsO/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer
P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

************

name: Greg
subject: Why I’m Ready to Serve, Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
I’m back on the campaign trail right now, but I want to send a quick note to thank all of the Hoosiers who have stepped up because they believe in... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
I’m back on the campaign trail right now, but I want to send a quick note to thank all of the Hoosiers who have stepped up because they believe in my message.

I’m humbled by your confidence in me and your support of me serving my country, again.

As an officer in the Marine Corps, I took care of my troops. I am Ready to Serve, Again because I want to take care of Hoosiers in the Sixth District by actually listening to their priorities and standing for America First.

There are only a few hours left before our fundraising deadline hits at midnight...

But the good news is -- we only need $952 to hit our $12,000 goal.

Every dollar counts. Every dollar demonstrates that our conservative, Hoosier First agenda is exactly what Sixth District Hoosiers want.

My finance team created a safe and secure link to donate: **[https://secure.gregpenceforcongress.com/action-251805/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=ea0d13a4acd54b758c95af9f2637b5e6&_e=ydMA_YxK-V-vR5bOMI5vwlB-ZxEO-eHu6t34StvdYQTKzBZ7CXTLdP85tPgk9XlT3xdeFO6cu742nRDpXvx2jP78QKObyDHKagDxFA387lwdLNzr23UwwAw_ctWD4SomIiGRYm42b87RcjlSJnVausUOlSZWD04Hn3MdO7h_TBoziWyB_QvBnTh9ucoNgQBNQmDzR-X1-58fV3bGNF2Egp4GcaX8c5PiM8N59f1cWlez5orwchCPmqdcV32wlB4IhUI07llDJw2DjJc37-12_nzoxi_h5Ghg_ix-II37nIUT-ukUvd5pAITJe76HvB8az_3FR8Srp4X51wxZBN7vKX1ZWfJQFwndn4wjf0ttKooPr624Ek5ysonTm8QRo2XBMRfVG6tdzlmGLrzXCS8YVft40bTdyS7tkZY0XTWK92I%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

name: Peter
subject: Joe was blunt. Now it's my turn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Peter, Joe asked. Kelly asked. Now I'm asking. We need the resources to fight back. If we don't hit tonight's goal we'll effectively be tellin |
---

| | Peter, Joe asked. Kelly asked. Now I'm asking.

If we don't hit tonight's goal -- and we still need another 25 supporters to pitch in -- we'll effectively be telling Mitch McConnell that he can do whatever he wants.

**But if we can close the gap, we 'll have the resources to stand up to Mitch, the Kochs, and anyone else who thinks they can run us over. We'll have the resources to FIGHT.**

Just a couple hours left. **[Please don't leave this up to chance -- Joe needs you. Pitch in $5 now.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6c8/1996997703/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?refcode=20180228.2nd&amount=10")**

\-- Peter

\----- Forwarded Message -----
From: **Joe**
Subject: I'll be blunt:
> Friend,
>
> I'll be blunt. **[I'm asking you to pitch in $5 (or whatever you can) to my reelection campaign.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6c8/1996997703/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?refcode=20180228.2nd&amount=10")**
>
> Now let me tell you why I'm asking. You may have seen the headlines about how the Koch brothers and their special interest allies are coming after me. They're all spending millions of dollars to replace me with a rubber stamp who will help them with their personal agenda.
>
> They know that if I win re-election, I'll continue to put the needs of Hoosiers before the goals of special interests -- and they will do anything to stop that from happening.
>
> Ok, so they're spending millions. Our side doesn't have their cash. **But what we do have is people like you. Tens of thousands of people who are ready to defend our values, our jobs, and our working families.**
>
> I need you to step up now, friend. Because the attacks have already begun, and the only way we can fight back is with grassroots power.
>
> So I'm asking: **Will you pitch in whatever you can to show that you want a senator who will stand up to special interests and fight for the middle class?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> ******[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6cb/1996997703/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?express_lane=true&refcode=20180228.2nd&amount=10")******

> ******[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6c5/1996997703/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?express_lane=true&refcode=20180228.2nd&amount=50")******
> ******[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6c4/1996997703/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?express_lane=true&refcode=20180228.2nd&amount=100")******
> ****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2357/7377f838/307d3ac6/51fac6c7/1996997703/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-feb18eom?refcode=20180228.2nd")****
> Our end of month deadline is tomorrow.
>
> Thanks for your help,
>
> Joe

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Make this movement yours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends,
Your vision of the future drives Our Revolution. Your dreams and ideas for a better country forge our path. Your fire ignites the flames of resistance in neighborhoods, towns, and cities that once were left behind.
I have traveled all over this country and the bottom line is that the system is flat-out rigged against working people. From states like Tennessee and Michigan to Hawai'i and Florida, I've seen too many people who are struggling to get access to clean drinking water, affordable housing, and jobs.
[**Your monthly contribution of just $5 sustains our organizing efforts in cities that are fighting for their future.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e7/4107410648/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re-full&recurring=true")
It is not going to happen overnight, but we are already so much closer than when we started in August of 2016. Where no grassroots organization previously existed, you have helped Our Revolution create **554 independent local groups and counting.**
If you see what I see, that people are sick and tired of the status quo, of the establishment telling us what is and is not possible, then you too can see the potential of what we are building. The political revolution is almost here--join us today and be a part of it.
[**Start making a monthly recurring contribution of just $5 to help build the political revolution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e7/4107410648/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re-full&recurring=true")
Everyone deserves an outlet through which we can express ourselves and make our voices heard in our democracy. That is our mission.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e7/4107410648/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180228-re-full&recurring=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e6/4107410648/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e1/4107410648/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e0/4107410648/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ace8/bed43eb/43f3218b/75fe03e3/4107410648/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
